name: Success — transaction journals created
description: Order-placement accrual. Send the order's transaction(s) with the appliedPromotions returned by the pricing call; Loyalty creates the transaction journals and accrues rewards (points, vouchers, etc.).
notes: Response shape is illustrative — the documented Promotion Reward Application output should be confirmed against the org. The request shape (transactionJournalList[].appliedPromotions[]) is doc-aligned.
